prompt: Polish this memo for executive readability. Apply BLUF framework. Save to outputs/polished-memo.md

assertions.name: bluf_applied
assertions.description: First paragraph leads with the bottom line (decision/action needed), not a status preamble or narrative introduction

assertions.name: paragraph_length
assertions.description: No paragraph exceeds 5 sentences or approximately 70 words

assertions.name: bold_anchoring
assertions.description: Key metrics (75%, $450K, Q2, 6 months) have bold formatting around them

assertions.name: active_voice
assertions.description: Majority of sentences use active voice — no passive constructions like 'it was decided' or 'things are being looked at'

assertions.name: flesch_readable
assertions.description: Improved readability compared to input — shorter sentences, simpler words, better flow
